name: Gerry Dee
bio: Gerry Dee is a Canadian stand-up comedian, actor and game-show host who drew on a decade of teaching to build his comedy. He began performing at Yuk Yuks open mic in 1999 and broke through in the early 2000s, becoming the first Canadian to win the San Francisco International Comedy Competition before quitting teaching for comedy full time. He created and starred in the long-running CBC sitcom Mr. D, based on his teaching persona.

timeline.ev: First open mic at Yuk Yuks in Toronto
First Canadian to win the SF Comedy Competition
Quits teaching to pursue comedy full time
Hosts Family Feud Canada on CBC

accolades: First Canadian to win the San Francisco International Comedy Competition
Creator and star of the CBC sitcom Mr. D

bits.t: The Worst Part About Being a Teacher
